Vexthorne  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Piercing Atk Delay: 19
DMG: 9 Dmg Bonus: 35
Backstab DMG: 9
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ROG
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Page Updated:Tue Apr 25th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 50

This item is found on creatures.

this thing is the rogue version of a lammy, the stats are the same (except the pluses) just a little interesting fact...

yes he is talking about pvp but in pvp terms there are faster weapons than this, such as locustlure 8/17 or shadow rage 8/18 the one more damage is nice but for interrupting a caster bring on locust

# Sep 18 2001 at 9:29 AM Rating: Decent

#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 19 2001 at 3:49 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Like you have to ask, you must be all of level 8 or so... the 10 damage weapon. If I have to explain why then maybe you should think about starting up a warrior; heck, since you asked maybe you should think about starting up a warrior, I'm sure you could get some nice warrior gear if you sold your trak tooth.

# May 07 2001 at 1:05 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592757229701
Scholar
17 posts
This item now drops off of the Avatar of Abhorrents. It doesn't drop all the time, but I've seen it drop 2 out of 3 times that I've helped kill him. He will also drop 2 random pieces of Woven Shadow.
